hero.name: Sanketh Patil
hero.tagline: Product-minded engineer turning strategy, data, and AI into real-world impact.
hero.summary: Full-stack builder crafting fast, minimal, insight-driven experiences with quiet confidence and thoughtful motion.

about.bio: I didn’t start by wanting to code—I wanted to understand why products win. So I learned to build to think like a product owner: test hypotheses, turn strategy into something real, and move from insight → interface → impact. Today I ship minimal, data-forward products at the intersection of AI, business strategy, and human behavior. I care about leverage. I care about clarity. I care about shipping things that compound.
technicalExecution: APIs & backend logic (Node / Python when needed)
principles: Speed creates surface area for luck

projects.title: Siemens Energy x NVIDIA Industrial AI Ecosystem (SMRs)
projects.description: Designed a Wintel-style industrial AI ecosystem for small modular reactors, blending Siemens hardware with NVIDIA twins to cut LCOE by 9-12% and speed regulatory readiness.

projects.title: J&J Budget Analytics Agentic AI
projects.description: Built agentic AI for Johnson & Johnson budgeting workflows, enabling real-time analytics, faster responses, and anomaly flagging with research-backed segmentation.

projects.title: AI Persona-Targeted OTT Content Optimization
projects.description: Created NLP-driven personalization and SEO/A-B testing pipelines that raised engagement on OTT surfaces and cut manual content effort by about half.

projects.title: RAG AI Assistant for MongoDB
projects.description: Built a RAG assistant with multi-format ingestion, vector search, and source-grounded GPT-4 responses to slash hallucinations and deliver sub-second answers.

projects.title: Discovery Growth for Video Platforms
projects.description: Uncovered discovery blind spots, separated relevance vs context failures, and delivered feed optimizations that improved engagement by roughly 12%.

projects.title: Intellekt AI for SAP Automation
projects.description: Advised on SAP BTP workflows and wrapper APIs to reduce billing disputes by 30-40% and improve cash flow through automated vendor and payroll ops.

highlights.title: Build to understand
highlights.detail: Map the system first—leverage, value accrual, failure modes—then build to test that model. Shipping is how hypotheses get proved or killed.

highlights.title: Strategy before surface
highlights.detail: Interface follows distribution, incentives, and positioning. Most product failures start with weak strategy, not weak UI.

highlights.title: AI as leverage, not novelty
highlights.detail: Use AI where automation reduces cognitive load, intelligence creates defensibility, and data compounds over time—not because it’s trendy.

highlights.title: Turn ambiguity into structure
highlights.detail: Break business cases, GTM plans, or messy ideas into hypotheses, metrics, and execution paths.

highlights.title: Calm intensity
highlights.detail: Move fast without panic-building. Clarity over noise; signal over ego.
